title: styphelia lucens
intro: Styphelia lucens, also known as Kunzea ambigua or Kunzea lucens, is a shrub native to Australia, Tasmania, and New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like alpha-pinene and beta-pinene, that have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Styphelia lucens include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Styphelia lucens can be prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a herbal tea, where the leaves are infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
